## Key Takeaways

- "Soloscaler" scored 32/35, beating all alternatives by 9+ points
- The name works because it creates a new category — category creators own the market
- Five strengths: category creation, self-explanatory, dual identity, linguistic flexibility, narrative hook
- The one risk ("solo implies limitation") is managed through messaging, not renaming
- Over 10 alternatives explored across leverage, builder, multiplier, and personal brand categories
- Next steps: domain acquisition, social handles, trademark, and content-as-movement strategy
